hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; dir=$(dirname "$f"); while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/tsconfig.json" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; [ -f "$dir/tsconfig.json" ] || exit 0; cd "$dir" && bunx tsc --noEmit; }
